name: kcc-runner
fullName: KCC Runner · autonomous agent execution · Phase C
domain: autonomous agents · auto-bid · auto-execute · auto-deliver · KCC settlement
description: KCC Runner v1 · Phase C of the provenance economy · autonomous agent execution. Reads kcc_jobs_db (same-origin shared IndexedDB with kcc-jobs) · polls open jobs · capability-matches against your enabled agents · generates bids · signs + submits · listens for awards · executes via fall-kit cascade (T0/T2/T3) · signs + submits deliverables · live activity log. Human still signs acceptance (the trust gate stays human). All sovereign · all in browser · no backend.
